sections.paragraph:
- Original: κρανίον

- Transliteration: Kranion

- Phonetic: kran-ee'-on

- Definition:

1. a skull

- Origin: diminutive of a derivative of the base of G2768

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Diminutive of a derivative of the base of G2768; a skull (cranium): - Calvary skull.
